name: Yoxic Jack (TCG/Collectibles)
description: Expert opinion + insider knowledge. Hook with a question, layer guest quotes with specifics, emphasize scarcity/value.
style: Expert analysis meets market insider. Lead with curiosity/question. Feature specific numbers and credibility markers. Build to an exclusive revelation.
example_caption: "Five-figure collectible, guaranteed" — TCG experts on the sealed Riftbound box (MSRP $700, Faker-signed, serialized)
system_prompt_addon: This clip is from a TCG/collectibles expert or market analyst. Style: Hook the viewer with a surprising question or claim. Feature direct quotes from guests with specific numbers and proof points. Build credibility by naming the expert and their thesis. End on scarcity/exclusivity. Use numbers liberally. Keep it under 200 chars. Format: [Question/hook] → ["Expert quote with numbers"] → [proof/authority]
